name: Fried Rice with Ground Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the wok, then add 3 tablespoons of oil.
2. Saute the onions until fragrant.
3. Add the ground beef and stir until it is cooked.
4. Add the rice and the 3 tablespoons ketchup, 1 teaspoon sugar, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 3 tablespoons oil.
5. Stir-fry until the rice is fried.
6. Serve. Serves 2.
